title: block: db.find_many
description:
On-disk shape of the block.

`block` is the serde discriminator — read by deserialization only, not by Rust code, hence the lint allow.

name.description: Binding name. `$<name>` references in `view` / `output` resolve to a `Vec<crate::models::T>` for the matched model.

table.description: Target table. Must match an existing model's `table`.

where.description: Filter expression. Either a CEL string or a structured filter object (the structured grammar is documented in `docs/blocks/db.find_many.md`).

order_by.description: Sort directive. Either `"-col"` / `"col"` or an array of those.

limit.description: Result cap. Either an integer literal or a `$input.X.X` reference.

offset.description: Pagination offset, same accepted shapes as `limit`.

Tag.description: Singleton discriminator. Anchors the `block: "db.find_many"` value in the JSON schema so agents see the exact string they must write.
